parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions FROM campaign WHERE segments.date = '${$('Trigger').first().json.yesterday}' AND campaign.status = 'ENABLED'` }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions FROM campaign WHERE segments.date = '${$('Trigger').first().json.yesterday}' AND campaign.status = 'ENABLED'` }) }}

parameters.sqlQuery:
{{ `
SELECT channel, COUNT(*) AS already_loaded
FROM \`${$vars.BQ_PROJECT}.${$vars.BQ_DATASET}.campaigns_daily\`
WHERE date = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY channel
` }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model:'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens:1000, system:$json.system, messages:$json.messages, tools:$json.tools, tool_choice:{type:'any'} }) }}

parameters.sqlQuery:
{{ `
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%meta%'       THEN 'meta'
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%google%'     THEN 'google_ads'
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%snapchat%'   THEN 'snapchat'
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%tiktok%'     THEN 'tiktok'
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%linkedin%'   THEN 'linkedin'
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%microsoft%'  THEN 'microsoft_ads'
    ELSE 'other'
  END AS channel,
  SUM(leads_total) AS bq_leads
FROM \`${$vars.BQ_PROJECT}.${$vars.BQ_DATASET}.hubspot_leads_module_daily\`
WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
GROUP BY channel
ORDER BY bq_leads DESC
` }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups:[{ filters:[{ propertyName:'hs_createdate', operator:'GTE', value:String(new Date($('Trigger').first().json.start_7d).getTime()) }]}], properties:['hs_createdate'], limit:1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ channel:$vars.SLACK_CHANNEL_NOTIFY, text:`:warning: *BQâ†”HubSpot reconciliation gap â€” ${$('Trigger').first().json.yesterday}*\n${$('Reconcile BQ vs HS').first().json.alert_msg}\nBQ: ${$('Reconcile BQ vs HS').first().json.bq_total} leads | HubSpot: ${$('Reconcile BQ vs HS').first().json.hs_total} leads` }) }}

parameters.sqlQuery: {{ `SELECT channel, MAX(date) AS latest_date, DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), MAX(date), DAY) AS days_stale FROM \`${$vars.BQ_PROJECT}.${$vars.BQ_DATASET}.campaigns_daily\` GROUP BY channel ORDER BY days_stale DESC` }}
